name: Deborah Edgar
title: Regional VP of Sales
quote:
It was an incredible honor to serve alongside Tory Bryant on the 2024 Honduras Mission Trip. From the very beginning, Tory's leadership set the tone for our entire team. In the arena of mission work and ministry, he truly leads from the heart. His unwavering faith, servant attitude, and deep compassion were evident in every interaction — whether with our team members or with the people we were blessed to serve as the hands and feet of Christ.

As this was my first overseas mission trip, I carried a natural sense of uncertainty and uneasiness. Tory has a remarkable gift for easing fear and replacing it with faith. He creates an environment where you feel safe to open your heart fully, step boldly into service, and trust God in the unfamiliar. His calm confidence and spiritual discernment allowed me — and so many others — to lean in rather than hold back.

What stands out most about Tory is his innate ability to connect with people. From colleagues to the communities we served, he engages with authenticity, humility, and genuine love. He doesn't simply lead projects; he shepherds people. When I was in need of prayer, Tory was always my first call. His faith is not just something he speaks about — it's something he lives out daily.
